_comment: mdvs Cursor hook config. Generated by `mdvs scaffold hook --platform cursor`. Merge into your existing .cursor/hooks.json. Cursor uses camelCase event names (postToolUse). Matcher names follow the Claude Code convention; verify they match your Cursor version (https://cursor.com/docs/hooks). Both hooks self-scope by walking up from the agent's cwd to find an `mdvs.toml` — they stay silent outside an mdvs vault.
